dueDate.description: Optional informational due date. It is not currently used for balance math, reminders, or settlement logic.

splitMethod.description: Always CUSTOM in the current backend. Equal splitting is a frontend convenience that submits explicit custom split rows.

description.example: Take out kitchen and bathroom trash before 9pm.
Take out kitchen and bathroom trash before 9pm.

ChoreTemplateAssignmentStrategy.description: Updated assignment mode for future occurrences.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code. Defaults to USD.

dueDate.description: Optional informational due date for this bill. It is not currently used for balance math, reminders, or settlement logic.

incurredAt.description: When the bill was incurred. Defaults to now.

paidByUserId.description: User id of the member who paid this bill.

splits.description: Explicit custom split rows. Amounts must sum exactly to totalAmount. Equal splitting is a frontend convenience that still submits explicit custom split rows.

totalAmount.description: Total bill amount. Supports up to 2 decimal places.

amount.description: Amount this user owes for the bill. Supports up to 2 decimal places.

userId.description: User id for this split row.

assigneeUserId.description: Required active group member who will own this one-off chore.

description.example: Take out kitchen and bathroom trash before 9pm.

dueOn.description: Required date-only due slot for the chore (YYYY-MM-DD).

endsOn.description: Optional inclusive final due occurrence date (YYYY-MM-DD).

participantUserIds.description: Required when assignmentStrategy is ROUND_ROBIN. Order determines rotation order.

repeatEveryDays.description: Positive day interval between due occurrences.

title.description: Template title for a recurring interval-based chore.

amount.description: Payment amount. Supports up to 2 decimal places.

billId.description: Optional related bill id for reference only. Must belong to the same group and use the same currency when provided.

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code. Defaults to USD.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key for safely retried payment requests. Reusing the same key with a different payment payload will return a conflict.

paidAt.description: When payment was made. Defaults to now.

payeeUserId.description: User id of the member receiving payment.

payerUserId.description: User id of the member sending payment.

settlements.description: Advisory settlement suggestions derived from current net balances.

joinCode.description: Join code generated by group admin

assigneeUserId.description: User ID of the active group member who should own this chore.
Updated fixed assignee. Only valid for FIXED templates.

endsOn.description: Updated inclusive end date (YYYY-MM-DD). Set null to clear.

participantUserIds.description: Updated ordered round-robin participant user IDs.

repeatEveryDays.description: Updated day interval between due occurrences.

title.description: Updated title for the recurring template.

content.description: New draft content for the group contract.
